item.title: Curl Cheatsheet
item.description: Curl is an invaluable tool for anyone who needs to debug webapps fequently. Given it’s vast amount of options, it is easy to miss some of it’s simplest yet powerful uses. Listing here some options that I use everyday. I’ll keep updating it as and when I discover something new! 🤘 Inspect response headers The simplest way to do that is by using the -I option - $ curl -I https://httpbin.
